title: Training Budget and Professional Development Request Process
text:
Q: How can I request funding for training and professional development?
A: Employees can request funding for training and professional development through the company’s Professional Development Request Form, which is available on the HR portal. To initiate the process, complete the form detailing the training program, associated costs, and how it aligns with your career goals and the company’s objectives. Submit the form to your direct supervisor for initial approval. Once approved, your supervisor will forward the request to the HR department for final review. Please allow 2-4 weeks for the entire approval process. Funding is subject to the annual training budget, and priority will be given to requests that align with departmental goals. For any questions or assistance, please contact the HR team at hr@company.com.
